rawAssistant: A gentle dawn breaks over Hollowfen. The mist that shrouded our roads has lifted, revealing... what secrets lie hidden on that one side road? I sense a quiet urgency about this place. Please, take a moment to examine those signs closely; they may hold more than meets the eye.
